user.title: OBD2 (TCP)
user.description: Connect to an ELM327-compatible adapter over TCP.

data.fuel_type: Default fuel type (used in calculations when the ECU does not report fuel type)

units.title: Display units
units.description: Choose how temperatures, pressure, speed, and distance are shown. OBD data is still read in standard ECU units; values are converted for Home Assistant. ELM327 low-power (PP0E) is only verified on VGate iCar Wi‑Fi; other adapters may be damaged if their programmable parameters differ.

data.distance_unit: Unit for odometer-style distances such as distance with check engine on
data.disable_elm_low_power: Disable ELM327 low power (PP0E; VGate iCar only — others may brick)
data.adapter_voltage_offset: AT RV adapter voltage correction (volts added; use 0 if readings already match the battery)
data.use_ign_gate: Gate OBD connect on AT IGN (IgnMon); skips ECU protocol probing when ignition appears off
data.ign_active_high: IgnMon HIGH means ignition on (disable if your adapter uses inverted sense)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect or ELM did not respond

init.title: OBD2 (TCP) units
init.description: Update how measurements are displayed. PP0E low-power disable is only safe on VGate iCar‑class hardware tested with this integration; other ELM327 adapters can be bricked.

data.distance_unit: Unit for odometer-style distances such as distance with check engine on
data.disable_elm_low_power: Disable ELM327 low power (PP0E; VGate iCar only — others may brick)
data.adapter_voltage_offset: AT RV adapter voltage correction (volts added; use 0 if readings already match the battery)
data.use_ign_gate: Gate OBD connect on AT IGN (IgnMon); skips ECU protocol probing when ignition appears off
data.ign_active_high: IgnMon HIGH means ignition on (disable if your adapter uses inverted sense)
